# ED — EDI

## What it does

Electronic Data Interchange — trading-partner integration for PO/invoice/ASN. Uses `BKEDH`/`BKEDL` headers/lines and `BKEDNOTE` notes. Processing via `BKEDPOST`.

module-AD.body:
# AD — Admin Defaults

## What it does

Admin Defaults — three screens that configure module-wide defaults:

- `AD-A` General Ledger Defaults
- `AD-B` Checking Account Defaults
- `AD-C` Accounts Payable Defaults
- `AD-D` Accounts Receivable Defaults (actually `AR-S`)

Values stored in `BKSYMSTR` / `BKYSMSTR`.

glossary-ach.title: ACH
glossary-ach.body:
# ACH
*Automated Clearing House — electronic bank transfer*

The electronic funds transfer system used in the US for direct deposit and direct debit. EVO generates ACH files for payroll direct deposit (`PR-E`) and vendor e-payments (`J7ADTNACHA.RWN`).

## See also
- [AP-H](#menu-AP-H)
- [PR-E](#menu-PR-E)
- [recipe-print-checks](#recipe-print-checks)

glossary-aging.title: Aging
glossary-aging.body:
# Aging
*Categorizing open receivables/payables by days overdue*

EVO aging reports bucket invoices into current/30/60/90/over-90 days. Run via `AR-F` (AR side) and `AP-I` (AP side).

## See also
- [AR-F](#menu-AR-F)
- [AP-I](#menu-AP-I)

glossary-bom.title: BOM
glossary-bom.body:
# BOM
*Bill of Materials — components of an assembly*

A parent-child list of what goes into making an item. In EVO, BOMs live in `BKBMMSTR`. Can be single-level (direct children only) or multi-level (recursively exploded). See [module-BM](#module-BM).

## See also
- [module-BM](#module-BM)
- [BKBMMSTR](#table-BKBMMSTR)

glossary-btrieve.title: Btrieve
glossary-btrieve.body:
# Btrieve
*The original name for Pervasive's database engine*

Btrieve is the Btree+ISAM engine that's evolved into **Pervasive PSQL** (now **Actian Zen**). EVO uses it for all data storage. Every table is a `.B` or `.B<company-code>` file. See [architecture-overview](#architecture-overview).

## See also
- [Pervasive](#Pervasive)
- [DDF](#DDF)
- [table-BKARCUST](#table-BKARCUST)

glossary-cfb.title: CFB
glossary-cfb.body:
# CFB
*Cipher Feedback — a block-cipher operating mode*

A mode that turns a block cipher into a stream cipher by feeding ciphertext back through the encryption. EVO's `.DCY`/`.RWN` encryption is Twofish in CFB mode. See [dcy-rwn-decryption](#dcy-rwn-decryption).

## See also
- [Twofish](#Twofish)
- [dcy-rwn-decryption](#dcy-rwn-decryption)

glossary-chm.title: CHM
glossary-chm.body:
# CHM
*Compiled HTML Help — Microsoft's help-file format*

`EvoHELP.CHM` is the user-facing help file, opened with F1 from inside EVO. Contains 779 topics — one per menu operation plus 90 conceptual chapters.

## See also
- [EvoHELP.CHM](#EvoHELP.CHM)
- [help-system](#help-system)

glossary-dcpcrypt.title: DCPcrypt
glossary-dcpcrypt.body:
# DCPcrypt
*The Delphi cryptography library used by TAS Pro 7*

Open-source Delphi crypto: provides Twofish, SHA1, DES, 3DES, and base cipher/hash classes. Embedded in `tp7runtime.exe`. See [dcy-rwn-decryption](#dcy-rwn-decryption).

## See also
- [Twofish](#Twofish)
- [tp7runtime.exe](#tp7runtime.exe)

glossary-ddf.title: DDF
glossary-ddf.body:
# DDF
*Data Definition File — Pervasive's schema catalog*

Btrieve stores schema in a set of DDF files: `FILE.DDF` (tables), `FIELD.DDF` (columns), `INDEX.DDF`, `ATTRIB.DDF`, etc. EVO has 659 tables catalogued this way. See [tables-index](#tables-index).

## See also
- [Btrieve](#Btrieve)
- [tables-index](#tables-index)

glossary-dfm.title: DFM
glossary-dfm.body:
# DFM
*Delphi Form (UI layout)*

Delphi's form-resource format — plaintext, human-readable. EVO UI screens are `.DFM` files like `T7ARA.DFM`. See [format-dfm](#format-dfm).

## See also
- [format-dfm](#format-dfm)
- [DCY](#DCY)

glossary-dcy.title: DCY
glossary-dcy.body:
# DCY
*Encrypted DFM*

The encrypted form of a `.DFM`. Produced by the TAS Pro 7 compiler with `#FORMSENCRYPTED <phrase>`. See [dcy-rwn-decryption](#dcy-rwn-decryption).

## See also
- [DFM](#DFM)
- [encryption](#encryption)

glossary-edi.title: EDI
glossary-edi.body:
# EDI
*Electronic Data Interchange*

Trading-partner standard for exchanging POs, invoices, ASNs, etc. In EVO, the [ED module](#module-ED) processes inbound and generates outbound.

## See also
- [module-ED](#module-ED)

glossary-erp.title: ERP
glossary-erp.body:
# ERP
*Enterprise Resource Planning*

Integrated software for running a business end-to-end. EVO is an ERP for small/mid manufacturers.

## See also
- [core-workflows](#core-workflows)

glossary-f2-lookup.title: F2 Lookup
glossary-f2-lookup.body:
# F2 Lookup
*The ubiquitous 'find a record' key in EVO*

Pressing F2 on any field bound to a key brings up a browse/search window for that entity. Works on customer codes, vendor codes, item codes, GL accounts, and most other lookup-driven fields.

## See also
- [menu-navigation](#menu-navigation)

glossary-fifo.title: FIFO
glossary-fifo.body:
# FIFO
*First In, First Out — inventory costing method*

Oldest receipts are sold first. EVO supports FIFO via lot-layer tracking in `BKICLOT`.

## See also
- [Costing methods](#Costing methods)
- [module-IN](#module-IN)

glossary-fno.title: FNO
glossary-fno.body:
# FNO
*Features and Options — configurable-product module*

Lets you sell an item with user-selected variants (size, color, options). Configurator UI launches from SO lines. See [subsystem-evofno](#subsystem-evofno).

## See also
- [subsystem-evofno](#subsystem-evofno)

glossary-gl.title: GL
glossary-gl.body:
# GL
*General Ledger — the accounting book of record*

Where every posting ends up. See [module-GL](#module-GL).

## See also
- [module-GL](#module-GL)

glossary-jc.title: JC
glossary-jc.body:
# JC
*Job Costing*

Actual-cost-vs-planned reporting for work orders. See [module-JC](#module-JC).

## See also
- [module-JC](#module-JC)

glossary-lifo.title: LIFO
glossary-lifo.body:
# LIFO
*Last In, First Out — inventory costing method*

Newest receipts are sold first. Supported in EVO via lot layers.

## See also
- [FIFO](#FIFO)
- [module-IN](#module-IN)

glossary-mrp.title: MRP
glossary-mrp.body:
# MRP
*Material Requirements Planning*

The scheduling algorithm that balances supply and demand to suggest what to buy and make. See [module-MR](#module-MR) and [recipe-run-mrp](#recipe-run-mrp).

## See also
- [module-MR](#module-MR)
- [recipe-run-mrp](#recipe-run-mrp)

glossary-nevrona-reportbuilder.title: Nevrona ReportBuilder
glossary-nevrona-reportbuilder.body:
# Nevrona ReportBuilder
*The report-rendering engine used by EVO*

Third-party Delphi component for report layout. Each report is an `.RTM` template; `RBDsgnr.exe` is the designer. See [format-rtm](#format-rtm).

## See also
- [RTM](#RTM)
- [format-rtm](#format-rtm)

glossary-odbc.title: ODBC
glossary-odbc.body:
# ODBC
*Open Database Connectivity*

Standard SQL interface. Pervasive PSQL's ODBC driver lets you query EVO data from Excel, Power BI, Crystal Reports, etc. See [odbc-access](#odbc-access).

## See also
- [odbc-access](#odbc-access)
- [Pervasive](#Pervasive)

glossary-po.title: PO
glossary-po.body:
# PO
*Purchase Order*

Document ordering goods/services from a vendor. See [module-PO](#module-PO).

## See also
- [module-PO](#module-PO)

glossary-pervasive.title: Pervasive
glossary-pervasive.body:
# Pervasive
*The database engine (now Actian)*

Pervasive Software → now Actian — the vendor of PSQL (Btrieve). EVO installations need the PSQL client or workgroup engine.

## See also
- [Btrieve](#Btrieve)
- [odbc-access](#odbc-access)

glossary-rfq.title: RFQ
glossary-rfq.body:
# RFQ
*Request for Quote*

Pre-purchase inquiry asking vendors to price goods. `RF-A Enter RFQ` in EVO.

## See also
- [recipe-rfq](#recipe-rfq)
- [PO-E](#menu-PO-E)

glossary-rma.title: RMA
glossary-rma.body:
# RMA
*Return Merchandise Authorization*

Customer return document. Entered as `SO-P-F`.

## See also
- [recipe-rma](#recipe-rma)

glossary-routing.title: Routing
glossary-routing.body:
# Routing
*The sequence of operations to produce an item*

Defines which work centers touch the product, in what order, for how long. Stored in `ROUTING` and `BKRTEMTR`. See [module-RO](#module-RO).

## See also
- [module-RO](#module-RO)
- [work centers](#work centers)

glossary-rtm.title: RTM
glossary-rtm.body:
# RTM
*ReportBuilder Template*

Binary Delphi stream (`TPF0` magic) holding a Nevrona ReportBuilder report layout. See [format-rtm](#format-rtm).

## See also
- [format-rtm](#format-rtm)
- [Nevrona ReportBuilder](#Nevrona ReportBuilder)

glossary-rwn.title: RWN
glossary-rwn.body:
# RWN
*TAS Pro 7 compiled program (encrypted)*

The current-generation compiled TAS program. Encrypted. Each menu operation's logic lives in a `.RWN`. See [format-rwn](#format-rwn).

## See also
- [format-rwn](#format-rwn)
- [DCY](#DCY)

glossary-so.title: SO
glossary-so.body:
# SO
*Sales Order*

Customer order document. See [module-SO](#module-SO).

## See also
- [module-SO](#module-SO)

glossary-src.title: SRC
glossary-src.body:
# SRC
*TAS Pro 4GL source code (plaintext)*

Human-readable TAS-Pro source. Usually `.SRC`, compiled to `.RWN`. See [format-src](#format-src) and [src-deep-dive](#src-deep-dive).

## See also
- [format-src](#format-src)
- [src-deep-dive](#src-deep-dive)

glossary-tas-professional-tas-pro-7-.title: TAS Professional (TAS Pro 7)
glossary-tas-professional-tas-pro-7-.body:
# TAS Professional (TAS Pro 7)
*The 4GL language and runtime EVO is built on*

A dialect of xBase family, developed by Business Tools / MGM / Addsum. The runtime is `tp7runtime.exe`. See [architecture-overview](#architecture-overview).

## See also
- [architecture-overview](#architecture-overview)

glossary-twofish.title: Twofish
glossary-twofish.body:
# Twofish
*The block cipher used to encrypt EVO RWN/DCY files*

128-bit block, 128/192/256-bit key, ex-AES finalist. In EVO, used in CFB mode with a fixed runtime key. See [dcy-rwn-decryption](#dcy-rwn-decryption).

## See also
- [CFB](#CFB)
- [encryption](#encryption)

glossary-vcl.title: VCL
glossary-vcl.body:
# VCL
*Visual Component Library — Delphi's UI framework*

Standard Delphi UI widgets. EVO extends them with `TTAS*` subclasses (e.g. `TTASEnter`, `TTASDataGrid`).

## See also
- [format-dfm](#format-dfm)

glossary-voucher.title: Voucher
glossary-voucher.body:
# Voucher
*An AP invoice in EVO terminology*

Synonymous with 'AP bill'. Entered via `AP-B`. See [recipe-enter-voucher](#recipe-enter-voucher).

## See also
- [recipe-enter-voucher](#recipe-enter-voucher)
- [module-AP](#module-AP)

glossary-wip.title: WIP
glossary-wip.body:
# WIP
*Work In Process — in-production inventory value*

The dollar value of components that have been issued to work orders but not yet received as finished goods. Reported by `WO-L-B`.

## See also
- [module-WO](#module-WO)
- [module-IN](#module-IN)

glossary-wo.title: WO
glossary-wo.body:
# WO
*Work Order — manufacturing order*

The document that tells the shop floor what to make. See [module-WO](#module-WO) and [recipe-work-order](#recipe-work-order).

## See also
- [module-WO](#module-WO)
- [recipe-work-order](#recipe-work-order)
